usage_rules: Code blocks must use JetBrains Mono with ligatures enabled if possible.

areas.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-border bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-xl fixed left-0 top-14 bottom-0 z-30
areas.header: h-14 border-b border-border bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-md fixed top-0 w-full z-40 flex items-center px-6 justify-between
areas.canvas: fixed inset-0 top-14 left-64 right-80 bg-background
areas.properties: w-80 border-l border-border bg-card/50 backdrop-blur-xl fixed right-0 top-14 bottom-0 z-30

nodes.style: Rounded-xl border border-border bg-card shadow-lg hover:shadow-primary/20 transition-all duration-300
nodes.header: px-4 py-2 border-b border-border/50 font-bold text-sm flex items-center gap-2

visual_enhancers.connections: Animated SVG edges with flowing particles (stroke-dasharray animation)
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used on Sidebar and Properties panel to allow canvas to bleed through slightly.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Layered shadows for depth. Nodes float above the grid.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the 'Control Room' layout with fixed sidebar, header, and properties panel.
Use React Flow for the main canvas area.
Ensure the 'Run' button triggers a visual flow animation on the edges.
The Code Preview should be a modal or a toggleable bottom panel using a dark syntax highlighter theme.
Use the 'Neon Void' color palette. Do not use default gray backgrounds.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Default to Dark Mode. The 'Light Mode' should be a 'Lab Mode' (clean white/gray/blue).
For the 'Layer Palette', use an Accordion component to group layers (Basic, Advanced, etc.).
For the 'Properties Panel', use dynamic form generation based on the selected node's type.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Avoid generic centered layouts. Use the full screen width.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Do not use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Manrope'.
